caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: 541690 is a catch-all and the supplied 4-digit 5416 role mix overstates management analysts relative to several technical niches.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: The RESIDUAL includes both highly analytical specialists and field-based work; 0.35 is a bounded mixed-task judgment, not an observed fraction.
inputs.pi_dist: No public 541690 revenue-by-fee-form mix was found; this is a dominant-subsegment estimate.
inputs.pi_moat: This measures firm retention of savings, not the separate terminal-demand floor.
inputs.t50_years: BTOS is all-business, all-function evidence, not a 541690 effective-adoption measure.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: This is usage in any business function, not task-level adoption or a code-specific survey.
inputs.historical_analogs: No verified 541690 historical analogue series was identified.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: Not a 541690 or owners-over-60 census; Baby Boomer status is an imperfect age proxy.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: Broad owner-readiness evidence, not a code-specific successor count.
inputs.active_consolidators: Equiteq is global specialty consulting and does not enumerate code-specific active consolidators on the public page.
inputs.buy_mult: BizBuySell reports small-business cash-flow/SDE metrics, not 541690 EBITDA; Equiteq is global specialty consulting and does not publish a 541690 EBITDA comp on its public page.
inputs.exit_mult: This is not an observed exit multiple; a key-person practice may exit below its entry multiple.
inputs.pricing_structure: No public 541690 revenue split by pricing model was located.
541690 is a heterogeneous residual code; V, C, and A rely on disclosed 4-digit, all-business, and dominant-subsegment proxies, so the score should not be treated as code-wide precision.

The B and M inputs use broad owner-readiness, micro-business, and global specialty-consulting evidence; the active-consolidator count and 5.0x/5.5x multiples are disclosed estimates, not observed 541690 figures.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $280,662 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541690); class <5: 21,931 firms, avg revenue/firm $392,629 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $61,446 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 1,982 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,624,294 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $254,202 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 1,074 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,555,412 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $556,422 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 892 firms, avg revenue/firm $9,179,598 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,436,607 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 247 firms, avg revenue/firm $38,382,737 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $6,006,898 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 162 firms, avg revenue/firm $73,152,086 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $11,448,302 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 1,139

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: Task-based estimate for a heterogeneous specialist-advisory mix: drafting, analysis, workflow and back office are exposed, while accountable expertise, client trust and physical/field work remain. The supplied 4-digit mix is a disclosed proxy.

l.detail: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541690 ($26,055,464,336) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541690 ($45,167,979,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: Publishable with caveats. Exact artifact identity, schemas, dataset injection, fresh finalization, memo rendering, and arithmetic all pass. All five registered sources are accessible and support the broad claims attributed to them, but the heterogeneous code, broad adoption and owner evidence, and non-code-specific market proxies make the factor values low-confidence estimates rather than precise 541690 measurements.

sources.title: North American Industry Classification System — U.S. Census Bureau
sources.what_it_supports: Official NAICS hierarchy locating 54169/541690 within professional, scientific and technical services; used to frame the code as an official residual classification rather than a single specialty market.

sources.title: Large Firms With at Least 20 Employees Biggest AI Users — U.S. Census Bureau
sources.what_it_supports: BTOS reports overall business AI use of 17%–20% between December 2025 and May 2026, notes less than 20% use among firms with four or fewer employees, and describes AI-business-function measurement.

sources.title: BizBuySell Insight Report — Data Tables
sources.what_it_supports: Public small-business listings and 2025 reported transaction tables with revenue and cash-flow multiples; used only as a micro/SDE market anchor, not as a 541690 EBITDA comp.

sources.title: State of Owner Readiness — Exit Planning Institute
sources.what_it_supports: National and regional owner-readiness survey program; its published summary states that 51% of the current American business market is owned by Baby Boomers and only 20%–30% of businesses brought to market sell.

sources.title: Specialty Consulting M&A Report — 1H 2025 — Equiteq
sources.what_it_supports: Specialty consulting deal activity, buyer interest in high-quality sector expertise, analytical/AI capability, proprietary IP and scalable delivery; explicitly a global specialty-consulting proxy rather than a 541690 comp set.

title: Other Scientific and Technical Consulting Services
